Off Calendar Aug-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ROBERT RESNER APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - AFTER HEARING TENTATIVE ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATIONS: Plaintiff CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INCORPORATED'S Motion to compel attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to contact counsel for plaintiff immediately to re-schedule the deposition. The deposition shall be completed by September 22, 2008. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $500 shall be paid within 30 days. Sanctions of $390 is stayed, stay to become permanent if defendant appears. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported. =610/BEC
